title: Bringing modern light to Sparta’s ancient treasures
description: A €10.4 million modernization and underground expansion of the historic Archaeological Museum of Sparta is underway, Culture Minister Lina Mendoni announced.

title: The largest insects that ever lived were dragonflies with wingspans of more than two feet, grown in an ancient atmosphere so much richer in oxygen that nothing that size could survive in the air we breathe today
description: The largest insect known to science was a predator called Meganeuropsis permiana, with a wingspan of about 71 centimetres, a little over two feet. It flew in the Early Permian, roughly 285 million years ago, and despite the way it is usually described, it was not a true dragonfly. title: Campaign to save ancient Derby woodland gets new boost
description: Plans to build 150 new homes next to the nature reserve in Oakwood were previously rejected

title: High-tech pilgrimages: Hikers on ancient Roman roads get digital help
description: Italy is using smartphone tech to guide tourists along five historic pilgrimage and trade routes in the Lazio region around Rome, introducing them to lesser-known corners of the country.
